score_evidence.brand_voice: Tone is professional, warm, and design-engaged: 'Es un gusto compartir...', references community benefit of the project, 'Quedamos completamente a su disposición.' Appropriate for both the relationship and the institutional context. Score 5.

decision_commentary: Excellent client communication. Message is bilingual, professional, client-ready with no internal artifacts. status=draft correctly set — awaiting Marcela approval before send. Channel (email) is appropriate for formal proposal delivery to a government client. Spanish narrative references obra pública compliance — appropriate institutional positioning. Only deduction is simulated Asana state sync.
